message:
fix(conformance): add shortcut field to list_shortcuts output (bd-150s)

Add 'shortcut' field to Rust list_shortcuts() output to match TS oracle
format. The TS oracle outputs {shortcut: "ctrl+alt+p", ...} but Rust was
outputting {key_id: "ctrl+alt+p", ...} without a 'shortcut' field.

The conformance test comparison uses the 'shortcut' field as the key
identifier, so shortcuts were being reported as mismatched.

This fix enables all 60 official pi-mono extensions to pass differential
conformance testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
